stack_assessment.description: Assumed technology stack for a mid-size security-conscious company running Trivy in CI/CD pipelines.

ci_cd.relevance: critical - directly affected by supply chain compromise

siem.relevance: high - detection rules delivered for both platforms

edr.relevance: high - IOC imports and persistence hunting delivered

identity.relevance: high - credential rotation and session invalidation required

cloud.relevance: critical - cloud credentials in CI/CD pipelines potentially exfiltrated

container_registries.relevance: critical - compromised Trivy images distributed through these registries
